category_sources: source_facts.description says pla builds Gantt charts; the official arpalert.org page describes Pla as a Gantt tool for PNG, EPS, PDF, or SVG output.
display_name_sources: Official arpalert.org page titles the project Pla - gantt tool.
docs_sources: Official Pla homepage includes build instructions, command-line help, planning file format, examples, and downloads.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe a command-line Gantt chart generator.
